_comment: MUD TEMPLATE - to add a new mud:
2. copy this file there as mud.json and fill in connection
3. (optional) mkdir muds/<mudname>/guilds and add guild jsons
4. relaunch picker - the mud appears in the Mud dropdown
Map/speedruns files are optional: with no <mudname>.map the
client runs maplessly; use '#map new' in a room to bootstrap
one, after which '#map on' + walking builds it via patches.
Set mip false for muds that don't speak 3k-style MIP.
